titleStmt.title: SII 6.1040: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1040. (A.R. No. 332-XXX of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1339 gunēṁṭi kārttika suddha 5 mi guruvārānanu kaḷiṁgaparīkṣa śrīkaraṇa paduvāpajīḍu Āṁbhbhumahāsēnāpati Adikarānanu gajapati pratāpa
vīra niśśaṁka bhānudēvarājulukai Āyuṣkāmyārtthaphalasiddhigānu śrīsiṁhyādrināthuniki nityamunnu tirumajana Avasaramunenakanu Āragiṁpanu niśśaṁkabhānubhōgamu Oka
ṭi samarppiṁcinu I bhōgana vrayanaku kaṇiti maṁḍuka reṁḍu Ūḷlunu peṭiri IŪri Utamapaṭakalasasāvaṇa paIṁḍi sahitamugānu birihiḍilamu kuḍumulanu bhōgaṁku
ṭinu Idi pōṁganu I Ubhiribali veharaṇa paIṁḍi saItamuganu Iṁtavaṭunu I bhōganaku nityamunu paṁdumu veṭenu Iṁdulakai pratyēkamu reṁḍu vīsalu yettu dīpalu 2 maḷalu 3 patri pala
malu 3 maḍapalli talyalu 4 kūralu papu Aṭikulu 7 ciḍiti maṇu Aṭikalu 2 paḷahi Aṭikalu 2 madukikki Aṭika Okaṭi 1 Arsa 2 sādhupurikakaralu 5 ciḍakulu 5 koraḍāciḍolu 5 pūrnnaci
ḍulu 5 jaUṭaburyala Aṭikalu 2 maṁḍalu 8 daIbaḍalu 10 panalu 2 sarabaḷacakra 1 vennacatra 1 punuUpaṭa ca 1 neḍiyāla pacaḍi ciḍi 1 bāsapaṇa Okaṭi 1 paIḍi 2 tamalapākula viḍi
yalu 4 pōṁkalu 1 I bhōganaku kaṇitigollalu Utaṟvipaḍi selaUgānu neIva 20 tu 5 peṭaṁgalāru kumarivarumāku saṁkrāṁtiki kaḍuvalu Āṟunu maṭapaḷi paIṁḍi sellaṁganu peṭa
ṁgalaru kaṇitiUri Agasālavāru modaluganu samastamaina paṭakalaUttaḷi paIṁḍi Uri Iṁḍilōnu sarvvamaina kalānakunnu kalasenu I patakaĀkasaUttaḷi paIṁḍi Ēminnilēdu
I bhōgāna dūpananu cāmarakolupu koluvanu taṁtāsāni naccerāUtuṇiki kuḍujītānaku kaṇitini polamu nālu puṭlu 4 I bhōgānanu kolici kolupulavariki prasādamu naṁbhyaḷu kuṁca
garekaḷi patribaḍuceṭi vēlunaIḍu kuṁca 1 paricarakamu Aḍa 1 Ī paricarakamu manyabācana siṭṭu mēgāpu Āca mahāsēnapati kuṁcca 1 karaṇamu taḷapuśaInā
yuḍu kuṁcca 1 Ēkāki manyagoḍaUlu paIṁḍi cinakētamanāyaḍu A 1 sīyamahāsēnāpati Oka māla peṭanu A 1 bōraṇi naṁnanāyuḍu Alavaṭa paṭanu A 1
Utama narisiṁhyānāyaḍu Ālavaṭamu A 1 pinakāliṁdi mokari pinagaṁgi reḍi kuṁttuṟulanu mōdara A 1 saṁpradāyamaṁdu nāraṇa gōmaṁtunāyani kuṁtuṟu sume
rapaṭanu A 1 mahçōsuvaḷu kuṁca 1 A 2 kini pālu kuṁca ..mānikaṟa AInakuṁca [A]ra
kini kuḍḍuma A 1 I bhōgānavēḷanu narasiṁhyakavacamu caduvanu gōpāḷadā
suku prasāda kuṁcca 1 purāṇamu caduvanu śrīraṁgajī pracada kuṁcalu 2 .Two more lines are entirely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 6.1040 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
